titleStmt.title: SII 40.261: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 261. (A.R. No. B. 306 of 1933.) Mādala, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a pillar set up before the Sakalēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1071, Vishuva Saṅkrānti.

Records the gift of 55 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Sakalēśvaradēva by Kūchema-Nāyaka, son of Pōte-Nāyaka of Māmaṁḍala. The gift was entrusted to Chāmena, son of Māremabōya for supply of ghee to the temple. Further it records the gift of 55 sheep to the same god by Viṭṭaya-Nāyak, for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple and that the gift was entrusted to Koṇḍabōya, son of Kommanabōya for supply of ghee to the temple. Also refers to food offerings of god Kēśavadeva for which land near one tank was gifted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti sakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1071 Agunēṁṭi vi
ṣumasaṁkrātti nimityamuna māmaṁḍa
la pōtenāyaku koḍku kūcemanāyakuḍu
sakatīsvaradēvarakakhaḍivatti dīpaṁbunakiccina go
ṟiyalu 55 vīniṁjēkoni māremabōyuni koḍku
cāmena tana putrānupautrikamācaṁdrā¨rkkamugā
māneṁḍu nēyi dēvara dīpaṁbunakuṁ bōyaṁgalavāru
vīri Iṁdula kēśavadēvara nivēdyamunakuṁ dama kaṭṭi
ṁccina ceṟvunaniccina mōdalimaṟṟu 1 vīru koḍku viṭṭa
ya nāyakuṁḍu sakalēśvara mahādēvaraki khaṁḍava
tti dīpaṁbunakiccina goṟiyalu 55 vīniṁ jēko
ni kommanabōyuni koḍku koṁḍabōyuṁḍu danapu
trānu pautrikamācaṁdrā¨rkkamu nityamāneṁḍu nē
yu voyaṁgalavāṇḍu vīri tammuṁḍu vāsi
Digital edition of SII 40.261 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
